dbc.sagasdb.1.1: Hello! Thank you for finding my turtle!
dbc.sagasdb.1.d: Here, use this present as you please
dbc.sagasdb.2.1: Yamcha: Heh, you are just a kid.
dbc.sagasdb.3.1: Pilaf: Don't stand in our way!
dbc.sagasdb.5.1: Pilaf: Now with this, you can't hurt us anymore!
dbc.sagasdb.8.1: Yamcha: I'll show you just how strong I've become
dbc.sagasdb.8.d: Yamcha: I guess I have still a lot to learn
dbc.sagasdb.9.1: Jackie-chun: I'll show you what a true martial artist can do
dbc.sagasdb.10.1: Jackie-chun: This is my full power!
dbc.sagasdb.12.1: Colonel Silver: So you are looking for the Dragon balls as well heh?
dbc.sagasdb.15.1: Android 8: I-I don't want to hurt you...
dbc.sagasdb.17.1: General white: Hah, I guess I have no choice but to surrender...
dbc.sagasdb.19.1: Mercenary Tao: Do you have any last words?
dbc.sagasdb.21.1: Staff Officer Black: I will take you to pieces
dbc.sagasdb.27.d: Masked man: I surrender, I am defeated
dbc.sagasdb.31.d: Krillin: I couldn't barely keep up
dbc.sagasdb.34.1: Tambourine: Did I make you cry?
dbc.sagasdb.35.1: Cymbal: If you are so eager to die who am I to stand in your way...
dbc.sagasdb.39.1: Drum: Heheheh. You're not going anywhere
dbc.sagasdb.40.1: King Piccolo: This will have to be a quick demonstration, I apologize
dbc.sagasdb.40.d: King Piccolo: HAAh... Good luck... my son, get revenge, destroy all of my enemies
dbc.sagasdb.41.1: Kami: Hello! Are you here to train?
dbc.sagasdb.41.d: Kami: Alright, let's see what I can teach you...
dbc.sagasdb.44.d: Tien Shinhan: I won't pretent I'm not wounded, but it's only my pride
dbc.sagasdb.46.1: Piccolo Jr.: HAHAHA. Do you really believe that you can defeat me?
dbc.sagadbsbroly.1.1: Vegeta: You might not want to face the prince of all Saiyans
dbc.sagadbsbroly.1.d: Vegeta: Let's see if you can handle me at my full power
dbc.sagadbsbroly.2.1: Goku: No way, it is my turn now!
dbc.sagadbsbroly.2.d: Goku: Heheh, you are pretty strong.
dbc.sagadbsbroly.3.d: Vegeta: He is learning as he fights...
dbc.sagadbsbroly.4.d: Goku: Oh wow, he is just in his base form and he is this powerful?!
dbc.sagasdb.0.title: Welcome to Dragon Block C
dbc.sagasdb.0.desc: This is an alternative story based on the Dragon Ball universe, so while it might resemble parts of the original story it is completely different. Because this is your story!/n/nYou feel an unpleasant energy! Are you prepared for this?
dbc.sagasdb.0.obj: Click Start to begin the Main Saga
dbc.sagasdb.1.title: Bulma and the Dragon balls
dbc.sagasdb.1.desc: You've met Bulma, a young girl who is looking to gather all of the Dragon balls. She has a radar which points towards the Sea. Explore the Ocean until you find someone who has one.
dbc.sagasdb.2.title: A desert bandit
dbc.sagasdb.2.desc: Yamcha appears out of nowhere and attacks you. Defeat him!
dbc.sagasdb.3.title: Pilaf Gang
dbc.sagasdb.3.desc: After traveling for some time you spot 3 people who are interested in stealing Dragon balls from others. Defeat them!
dbc.sagasdb.4.title: Mechs of the Pilaf Gang
dbc.sagasdb.4.desc: They bring out powerful robots to defeat you.
dbc.sagasdb.5.title: Combined power
dbc.sagasdb.5.desc: All of their Mechs combined into one.
dbc.sagasdb.6.title: Tournament announcement
dbc.sagasdb.6.desc: Roshi mentions that a tournament was announced and he suggests you to enter.
dbc.sagasdb.7.title: Quarter-Finals
dbc.sagasdb.7.desc: You, and many other fighters have managed to enter the finals of the Tournament./nDefeat your first opponent!
dbc.sagasdb.8.title: Semi-Finals
dbc.sagasdb.9.title: Finals
dbc.sagasdb.10.title: Finals Part 2
dbc.sagasdb.11.title: The Red Ribbon Army
dbc.sagasdb.11.desc: After you have won the Tournament the Red Ribbon Army had started to make their move. They are interested in gathering the Dragon balls./nBe sure to look out for them!
dbc.sagasdb.12.title: Meeting with the Army
dbc.sagasdb.12.desc: You have ran into the Red Ribbon Army's territory and got attacked by their men.
dbc.sagasdb.13.title: Major Problem
dbc.sagasdb.13.desc: A giant person comes out to face you. Be prepared!
dbc.sagasdb.14.title: A swift man
dbc.sagasdb.14.desc: A ninja tried to take you out by suprise. He is most likely searching for the Dragon balls as well.
dbc.sagasdb.15.title: More androids
dbc.sagasdb.15.desc: An advanced Android has been released with the intention of taking you out.
dbc.sagasdb.16.title: Trapped
dbc.sagasdb.16.desc: You were caught in a trap, which released a giant creature. Let's hope that it is friendly...
dbc.sagasdb.17.title: Caught off guard
dbc.sagasdb.17.desc: A General tried to catch you off guard.
dbc.sagasdb.18.title: Another Foe
dbc.sagasdb.18.desc: A different general came to take you out. This one seems much more powerful.
dbc.sagasdb.19.title: A fearful opponent
dbc.sagasdb.19.desc: General Blue was taken out easily by someone who seems to be from their side...
dbc.sagasdb.20.title: End of the RR
dbc.sagasdb.20.desc: The Red Ribbon Army must be taken out as soon as possible. They are too much of a threat to the world!
dbc.sagasdb.21.title: Final Fight
dbc.sagasdb.21.desc: Staff Officer Black has taken out their leader, and is now trying his best to take you out!
dbc.sagasdb.22.title: A Fortuneteller
dbc.sagasdb.22.desc: After the defeat of the RR Army, another world tournament was announced. Be sure to gather the dragon balls and train beforehand!
dbc.sagasdb.23.title: The five fighters
dbc.sagasdb.23.desc: In order to gain access to a dragon ball you have to defeat Fortuneteller Baba's Fighters starting with...
dbc.sagasdb.24.title: Second fighter
dbc.sagasdb.24.desc: Noone seems to be here, or is it?
dbc.sagasdb.25.title: Third fighter
dbc.sagasdb.26.title: Fourth fighter
dbc.sagasdb.27.title: Last fighter
dbc.sagasdb.27.desc: This guy seems to be a master of martial arts.
dbc.sagasdb.28.title: Second Tournament announcement
dbc.sagasdb.28.desc: It is time for your second Tournament. The fighters have gathered and it is time to start!
dbc.sagasdb.29.title: Preliminaries
dbc.sagasdb.29.desc: Your first match of the Tournament.
dbc.sagasdb.30.title: Quarter-Finals
dbc.sagasdb.30.desc: Your first final match of the Tournament.
dbc.sagasdb.31.title: Semi-Finals
dbc.sagasdb.31.desc: Your second final match of the Tournament.
dbc.sagasdb.32.title: Final match
dbc.sagasdb.32.desc: Your last match of the Tournament.
dbc.sagasdb.33.title: A brutal ending
dbc.sagasdb.33.desc: The tournament is over. As everyone walked away they've found Krillin lying on the ground. He was taken out by someone. He will pay for this!
dbc.sagasdb.34.title: Facing a murderer
dbc.sagasdb.34.desc: Tambourine was taking out strong fighters from the tournaments. Take him out before he causes more harm to innocent people!
dbc.sagasdb.35.title: Need to train
dbc.sagasdb.35.desc: Tambourine maganed to walk away from the fight, but he wasn't using his full power. Make sure to train before facing him again, but King Piccolo has sent out a new henchman to gather the Dragon balls for him.
dbc.sagasdb.36.title: A wanted rematch
dbc.sagasdb.36.desc: Tambourine has once again appeared. This time he will fight using his full power.
dbc.sagasdb.37.title: The king himself
dbc.sagasdb.37.desc: Piccolo appeared in front of you, but he is very old. He is gathering the Dragon balls to make himself young again. Take him out before his plans succeed!
dbc.sagasdb.38.title: Unstoppable force
dbc.sagasdb.38.desc: King Piccolo was not defeated in time and wished to be young again. Noone is sure if he can still be taken out with his newfound powers.
dbc.sagasdb.39.title: A new henchman
dbc.sagasdb.39.desc: Piccolo's new son has taken out Tien. Save him and take out Piccolo!
dbc.sagasdb.40.title: Can he be defeated?
dbc.sagasdb.40.desc: If Piccolo isn't taken out now then who knows what might happen next.
dbc.sagasdb.41.title: Third tournament announcement
dbc.sagasdb.41.desc: The world is at piece, but everyone is looking forward to the next martial arts tournament. Be sure to use your time to the fullest, and train a lot!/nMeet up with Kami and talk to him.
dbc.sagasdb.42.title: It is time
dbc.sagasdb.42.desc: Your third tournament is about to start. Make sure to not underestimate your opponents.
dbc.sagasdb.43.title: Quarter-Finals
dbc.sagasdb.43.desc: Tao is back with new tricks up his sleeve.
dbc.sagasdb.44.title: Semi-Finals
dbc.sagasdb.44.desc: Tien has gained a lot of power since you've last fought him.
dbc.sagasdb.45.title: Final match
dbc.sagasdb.45.desc: It seems that he is Piccolo's son. His power is incredible.
dbc.sagasdb.46.title: Final match 2
dbc.sagasdb.46.desc: Piccolo has unleashed his full power!
dbc.sagasdb.47.title: A long journey
dbc.sagasdb.47.desc: Much time has passed, and many stories will be born from the events you went through./nLife seems to be going forward in piece, but don't become too soft, who knows what might still come.
dbc.sagasystem.1.title: What? Saiyans? Are they edible?
dbc.sagasystem.1.desc: Kill Saibaimen to get more information. They can be found in the Rocky Biome.
dbc.sagasystem.2.title: Arrival of Raditz
dbc.sagasystem.2.desc: Raditz arrived on Earth looking for his brother, who was sent here as a baby.
dbc.sagasystem.3.title: Stronger Saiyans
dbc.sagasystem.3.desc: Raditz told you that there are 2 more saiyans on their way, more powerful then he was.
dbc.sagasystem.4.title: Vegeta and Nappa
dbc.sagasystem.4.desc: They arrived and want to eradicate Earth. Don't let them!
dbc.sagasystem.5.title: Vegeta Escaped
dbc.sagasystem.5.desc: Travel to Namek, if you want a greater challenge... You will get it there >)
dbc.sagasystem.5.obj: Go to Namek with a Spacepod
dbc.sagasystem.6.title: Who is Frieza?
dbc.sagasystem.6.desc: Soldiers everywhere on Namek! Where do they come from and why?
dbc.sagasystem.7.title: New Danger!
dbc.sagasystem.7.desc: 'What is this? Stronger than me? No way! There is no one stronger!'
dbc.sagasystem.8.title: Dodoria Finds You!
dbc.sagasystem.8.desc: 'If you dare I'm here! I'm the Strongest.'
dbc.sagasystem.9.title: Zarbon Do Something! Or else!
dbc.sagasystem.9.desc: It looks like Zarbon must fight, or be killed by Frieza... Well, he will be killed anyway if he is in your way.
dbc.sagasystem.10.title: The Ginyu Force
dbc.sagasystem.10.desc: 'Im Recoom','Im Burter,'im Jeice','Guldo','Captain Ginyu'... All Of Us Together Are... The Ginyu Force! WTF?!
dbc.sagasystem.11.title: He Won't Forgive!
dbc.sagasystem.11.desc: 'You destroyed my plans, my force my wish! Now how would you like to be killed?!'
dbc.sagasystem.12.title: Back to Earth
dbc.sagasystem.12.desc: The Fight is over. Go Back to Earth to make sure everything is fine.
dbc.sagasystem.13.title: Isn't Frieza Dead?
dbc.sagasystem.13.desc: You sensed a large Ki presence heading straight to Earth... It can't be... It's him!
dbc.sagasystem.14.title: Frieza is Back!
dbc.sagasystem.14.desc: Fight them and don't let Earth fall to its doom!
dbc.sagasystem.15.title: King Cold is Huge...
dbc.sagasystem.15.desc: Frieza is more powerful then before and now, he is here with his daddy?
dbc.sagasystem.16.title: Super Saiyan state
dbc.sagasystem.16.desc: The ability to become a Super Saiyan was once considered to be nothing but a legend, as it had not been achieved for over 1000 years.
dbc.sagasystem.17.title: Bad Omen
dbc.sagasystem.17.desc: Kami looks like he want to tell you something very important.
dbc.sagasystem.18.title: Something is wrong!
dbc.sagasystem.18.desc: What could it be, what is Kami so afraid of? Lets hope its not as bad as he says it is.
dbc.sagasystem.19.title: Androids?
dbc.sagasystem.19.desc: 'First an alien, now androids. Just great. What is happening in this world...?'
dbc.sagasystem.20.title: More Androids?
dbc.sagasystem.20.desc: That #20 guy got away. He told you something about Androids #17 and #18. He said that they are way stronger then he was.
dbc.sagasystem.21.title: New Androids
dbc.sagasystem.21.desc: According to Kami the androids are in a Plains biome.
dbc.sagasystem.22.title: Dr Gero was Android #20
dbc.sagasystem.22.desc: It Seems the Androids were activated and one of them wants to fight. Fight The Android.
dbc.sagasystem.23.title: Cell the Bio-Android
dbc.sagasystem.23.desc: What is this? It doesn't seem to be an android, but it is really strong.
dbc.sagasystem.24.title: Fight Cell
dbc.sagasystem.24.desc: Cell said he will cease-fire until you get stronger. Where are the other Androids?
dbc.sagasystem.25.title: #16 wants to protect #17?
dbc.sagasystem.25.desc: It looks like #16 is stronger than #17. Hmm... what is his purpose?
dbc.sagasystem.26.title: Cell Again
dbc.sagasystem.26.desc: It seems Cell Finally managed to absorb #17... Well this doesn't look good.
dbc.sagasystem.27.title: Ascended Super Saiyan
dbc.sagasystem.27.desc: Reach a state above Super Saiyan to battle Cell with full power.
dbc.sagasystem.27.obj: Reach a new Super Saiyan State
dbc.sagasystem.28.title: Cell waits
dbc.sagasystem.28.desc: 'I wont let Cell do as he pleases! He will die by my hand!'
dbc.sagasystem.29.title: Final showdown 1
dbc.sagasystem.30.title: Final showdown 2
dbc.sagasystem.30.desc: Fight Cell to the fullest and save Earth.
dbc.sagasystem.31.title: New Threat
dbc.sagasystem.31.desc: King Kai is warning about urgent trouble! He warns you that an evil sorcerer Babidi is trying to revive the greatest evil the universe has ever known: Majin Buu. Stop him! You can find his ship in a plains biome.
dbc.sagasystem.31.obj: Find Babidi ship in a plains biome
dbc.sagasystem.32.title: Babidi's first minion
dbc.sagasystem.32.desc: Pui-Pui, is here to fight you! Take him out!
dbc.sagasystem.33.title: Yakon
dbc.sagasystem.33.desc: Babidi releases his monster: Yakon. Don't let him get near you! (Yakon will give blindness to make it dark)
dbc.sagasystem.34.title: The Demon King
dbc.sagasystem.34.desc: Babidi has sent his right hand man, Dabura, to fight you. He is much stronger than the others
dbc.sagasystem.35.title: Surprise
dbc.sagasystem.35.desc: Dabura used your battle as a chance to absorb your energy for Majin Buu! It was enough to revive him and he is... not what you were expecting. This creature is really Majin Buu? It is a fat pink blob! Wait! It killed Dabura and turned him to chocolate. It is obviously stronger than you thought!
dbc.sagasystem.36.title: More Power
dbc.sagasystem.36.desc: There may be a new level of power you can ascend to... beyond a Super Saiyan or Super Saiyan two...
dbc.sagasystem.37.title: Again
dbc.sagasystem.37.desc: Majin Buu defeated you, but he wasn't able to kill you. You must quickly find him and stop him! You will need more power.
dbc.sagasystem.38.title: Find the source of the power!
dbc.sagasystem.38.desc: Majin Buu killed Babidi and seems to have began a peaceful life. Everything seems to have turned out all right despite you not doing anything. Unfortunately there is a really large power in the direction in which he went. Time to investigate.
dbc.sagasystem.39.title: Super Majin
dbc.sagasystem.39.desc: Majin Buu has become much skinnier, and much more powerful. You are in for one hell of a fight!
dbc.sagasystem.40.title: Super Majin Fusion
dbc.sagasystem.40.desc: Oh no! Majin Buu had absorbed Gotenks and Piccolo!
dbc.sagasystem.40.obj: Fight Super Majin Buu Gotenks absorbed
dbc.sagasystem.41.title: Super Majin Piccolo
dbc.sagasystem.41.desc: Wait, the fusion of Gotenks is over, and Buu had gotten a lot weaker! This is your chance!
dbc.sagasystem.41.obj: Fight Super Majin Buu Piccolo absorbed
dbc.sagasystem.42.title: Super Majin Gohan
dbc.sagasystem.42.desc: Gohan had unlocked a new level of power, but managed to get caught by Buu's absorbation... is there any hope of defeating such a powerful enemy?
dbc.sagasystem.42.obj: Fight Super Majin Buu Gohan absorbed
dbc.sagasystem.43.title: Kid Buu
dbc.sagasystem.43.desc: Goku and Vegeta were absorbed while fused, but they have managed to save everyone absorbed! No.. wait.. Buu's power is not going down as much as expected...
dbc.sagasystem.44.title: It's over
dbc.sagasystem.44.desc: Buu's energy... it has finally vanished. The fight is finally over.
dbc.sagasystem.45.title: Supreme Kai's warning
dbc.sagasystem.45.desc: Oh no, I have some really bad news... the God of Destruction Beerus has awoken.. and he plans to go to earth. This might be big trouble. Make sure that you don't upset him!
dbc.sagasystem.46.title: Fight Beerus
dbc.sagasystem.46.desc: Buu has made Beerus mad. There is no other choice but to take him down now!
dbc.sagasystem.47.title: The power of a God
dbc.sagasystem.47.desc: Thanks to Shenlong we now know the secret of becomming a God.
dbc.sagasystem.48.title: Fight Beerus again
dbc.sagasystem.48.desc: Try to entertain me with your newfound powers
dbc.sagasystem.49.title: Whis's training
dbc.sagasystem.49.desc: Beerus fell asleep, so for now we won't have to worry about Earth getting destroyed, but that means that it's still not completely safe just yet. You asked Whis if he could start training you in return of giving him delicious food.
dbc.sagasystem.50.title: Return of Freeza
dbc.sagasystem.50.desc: What's this? Why is Freeza back on earth? This must be the work of the Dragon balls. And he is not alone.
dbc.sagasystem.51.title: Shisami
dbc.sagasystem.51.desc: This one doesn't seem to be weak.
dbc.sagasystem.52.title: Tagoma (Ginyu)
dbc.sagasystem.52.desc: Tagoma has killed Shisami, but now Captain Ginyu has taken his body!
dbc.sagasystem.53.title: Freeza's revenge
dbc.sagasystem.53.desc: Freeza should be the only one left, but he is far more stronger then last time...
dbc.sagasystem.54.title: Beyond God
dbc.sagasystem.54.desc: This form is the super saiyan of super saiyan god.
dbc.sagasystem.55.title: Golden Freeza
dbc.sagasystem.55.desc: How did he get so strong in such a short amount of time?
dbc.sagasystem.56.title: Freeza's end
dbc.sagasystem.56.desc: Finally, Freeza is back down again. Beerus had met his brother Champa again, but they decided to fight against each other. Goku suggested a tournament between the 2 universes, and you are picked to be a member for the team.
dbc.sagasystem.57.title: Match 1: Botamo
dbc.sagasystem.57.desc: Every member of the team passed the written test for the Tournament, and now it is time for the first battle.
dbc.sagasystem.58.title: Match 2: Frost
dbc.sagasystem.58.desc: Could a Freeza from another universe actually be different?
dbc.sagasystem.59.title: Match 3: Magetta
dbc.sagasystem.59.desc: A big metal man. He seems like a bigger threat then Frost.
dbc.sagasystem.60.title: Match 4: Cabba
dbc.sagasystem.61.title: Match 4: Cabba SSJ
dbc.sagasystem.61.desc: Now this might be more interesting.
dbc.sagasystem.62.title: Match 5: Hit
dbc.sagasystem.62.desc: This might be a very interesting fight.
dbc.sagasystem.63.title: Zeno-sama
dbc.sagasystem.63.desc: Hit managed to defeat you, but thanks to the strong fighter Monaka Universe 7 managed to win the Tournament! But from out of nowhere Grand Zeno, the Omni King appeared. He has taken an interest in the fights, and wants to repeat it, but with all the universes participating.
dbc.sagasystem.64.title: Monaka
dbc.sagasystem.64.desc: Monaka seems like a strong, but mysterious fighter. Let's see how strong he really is!
dbc.sagasystem.65.title: Trouble for Vegeta
dbc.sagasystem.65.desc: Something had happened to Vegeta, he is becomming transparent, and a purple Duplicate had appeared. You must defeat it to save Vegeta!
dbc.sagasystem.66.title: Copy Vegeta Blue
dbc.sagasystem.66.desc: He powered up to his limits!
dbc.sagasystem.67.title: Time ring
dbc.sagasystem.67.desc: Vegeta is back to normal, but it feels like something big is comming... Bulma notified Goku and Vegeta that Trunks had come back for an unknown reason, and he is out cold. After waking up he explained about the new evil he had to face against in the future timeline.
dbc.sagasystem.68.title: Goku Black
dbc.sagasystem.68.desc: A portal opened, and Black comes through it. Who is he? He looks just like Goku.
dbc.sagasystem.69.title: A portal to the future
dbc.sagasystem.69.desc: Goku Black was forcefully pushed back to the future, but he destroyed the time machine.
dbc.sagasystem.70.title: Zamasu
dbc.sagasystem.70.desc: The supreme kai apprentice of the 10th universe has a very familiar aura to this Black.
dbc.sagasystem.71.title: Goku Black again
dbc.sagasystem.71.desc: Bulma had managed to fix the time machine so now you have a second new chance to defeat him!
dbc.sagasystem.72.title: Goku Black Rose
dbc.sagasystem.72.desc: Goku Black has transformed to Super Saiyan Rose. His power is just unbelievable.
dbc.sagasystem.73.title: Strong Foe
dbc.sagasystem.73.desc: Zamasu had appeared out of nowhere and Goku Black has become far too powerful to take on. The only way to defeat him is to train more.
dbc.sagasystem.74.title: End of Zamasu
dbc.sagasystem.74.desc: After seeing that Zamasu did take part in the future's destruction Beerus decided to take him out using Hakai. Beerus gave his word that with this the future is also saved.
dbc.sagasystem.75.title: Future Fight
dbc.sagasystem.75.desc: Although Beerus seemed very sure of his word you decided to check on the future once again with Trunks, Goku and Vegeta, but they are still not gone...
dbc.sagasystem.75.obj: Fight Goku Black SSJ Rose and Zamasu
dbc.sagasystem.76.title: Trunks's new form
dbc.sagasystem.76.desc: Trunks managed to achieve a new form of Super Saiyan, but even with all this power the best he can do is hold back Black and Zamasu until You, Goku and Vegeta escape.
dbc.sagasystem.77.title: Fused Zamasu
dbc.sagasystem.77.desc: There isn't much time to waste, you and the others go back to save Trunks, who was in the middle of fighting, but Zamasu decided to fuse with Black using the potaras as he was almost sealed by Trunks.
dbc.sagasystem.78.title: Unstable Zamasu
dbc.sagasystem.78.desc: You managed to destroy Zamasu's barrier of light, but he seems to become unstable.
dbc.sagasystem.79.title: Last chance
dbc.sagasystem.79.desc: Zamasu's anger is giving him more power, you will have to finish this now, before it's too late!
dbc.sagasystem.80.title: Future Zeno
dbc.sagasystem.80.desc: This is not good. Zamasu lost, but somehow he managed to merge with the world itself and started to expand in the universe. Goku decided to call Zeno to him, but he decided to erase the world. You've managed to flee to the past with the others, but the future has been destroyed. Whis decided to go with Trunks to a future timeline letting a future Beerus know about Black's plan to prevent the problem from starting, and giving Trunks a new world to be.
dbc.sagasystem.81.title: Hit round 2
dbc.sagasystem.81.desc: You decided to hire hit to have a second chance to fight him, but this time with his full power.
dbc.sagasystem.82.title: Zeno Expo
dbc.sagasystem.82.desc: The time has come, the Zeno expo will begin as a short preliminary event. Find Whis at Kami's lookout to ask him to teleport you to the Null Realm Dimension.
dbc.sagasystem.83.title: Zeno Expo Round 1
dbc.sagasystem.83.desc: Basil from the Trio of Danger is your first opponent.
dbc.sagasystem.84.title: Zeno Expo Round 2
dbc.sagasystem.84.desc: Lavender from the Trio of Danger is your second opponent.
dbc.sagasystem.85.title: Zeno Expo Round 3
dbc.sagasystem.85.desc: Bergamo from the Trio of Danger is your final opponent.
dbc.sagasystem.86.title: Zeno Expo Extra
dbc.sagasystem.86.desc: Toppo, a fighter from Universe 11 has challenged you to a fight.
dbc.sagasystem.87.title: Gathering for the Tournament
dbc.sagasystem.87.desc: The Zeno Expo had ended and the Tournament of Power arena is being tested if it can withstand the power of the upcomming fighters. Return to earth with Whis to spar with others.
dbc.sagasystem.88.title: Sparring with Friends
dbc.sagasystem.88.desc: Gohan asked if you could fight him with your full power to test his current limits.
dbc.sagasystem.89.title: Sparring with Friends 2
dbc.sagasystem.89.desc: Krillin has been getting more confident in his skill so he asked you to do a little sparring with him as well.
dbc.sagasystem.90.title: The Tournament of Power
dbc.sagasystem.90.desc: The arena and universes are ready for the tournament. Go to Whis again so that he can teleport you to the Null Realm.
dbc.sagasystem.91.title: Universe Battles 1
dbc.sagasystem.91.desc: The Danger Trio hasn't gotten over their defeat yet so they quickly catch you by suprise for an early battle.
dbc.sagasystem.92.title: Universe Battles 2
dbc.sagasystem.92.desc: Caulifla, a saiyan from Universe 6 had taken an interest in your power so she decided to take you on with her sister Kale.
dbc.sagasystem.93.title: Universe Battles 3
dbc.sagasystem.94.title: Universe Battles 4
dbc.sagasystem.94.desc: Kale had suddenly revealed great power after seeing her sister loosing.
dbc.sagasystem.95.title: Universe Battles 5
dbc.sagasystem.95.desc: Brianne tried to take you out with a sneak attack that missed.
dbc.sagasystem.96.title: Universe Battles 6
dbc.sagasystem.96.desc: The first fighter from Universe 11 you must face is Dsypo.
dbc.sagasystem.97.title: Universe Battles 7
dbc.sagasystem.97.desc: Toppo jumps in to take you on to save Jiren's power for the end.
dbc.sagasystem.98.title: Universe Battles 8
dbc.sagasystem.98.desc: Jiren sees that you have great power, so he knows that he must be the one to take you on in order to win.
dbc.sagasystem.99.title: Universe Battles 9
dbc.sagasystem.99.desc: Caulifla and Kale used potaras to fuse together, and they are back for another round.
dbc.sagasystem.100.title: Universe Battles 10
dbc.sagasystem.101.title: Universe Battles 11
dbc.sagasystem.101.desc: Toppo was pushed to his limits and gave up on justice in order to survive the Tournament.
dbc.sagasystem.102.title: Universe Battles 12
dbc.sagasystem.102.desc: The end is near for the tournament and Jiren is still standing strong. He needs to be taken out!
dbc.sagasystem.103.title: Universe Battles 13
dbc.sagasystem.103.desc: With the help of Toppo Jiren managed to unleash his true power!
dbc.sagasystem.104.title: End of the Tournament
dbc.sagasystem.104.desc: You've managed to defeat every opponent and won the Tournament! All of the universes who were destroyed throughout the battles were revived thanks to your wish.
dbc.sagasystem.105.title: The End
dbc.sagasystem.105.desc: Thank you for playing Dragon Block C!/nI would like to take a moment to thank all of those who have helped develop the mod to this point, and who still help it continue to grow./nYou may replay the saga if you wish. /nAs time goes content grows too!
dbc.sagadbsbroly.0.title: After the Tournament
dbc.sagadbsbroly.0.desc: Time had passed since the Tournament of Power, and everyone is living a peaceful life, but that doesn't mean that it is time to relax.
dbc.sagadbsbroly.1.title: Sparring with Vegeta
dbc.sagadbsbroly.1.desc: You've challenge Vegeta for a sparring match.
dbc.sagadbsbroly.2.title: Sparring with Goku
dbc.sagadbsbroly.2.desc: You've challenge Goku for a sparring match.
dbc.sagadbsbroly.3.title: Frieza creates Trouble again
dbc.sagadbsbroly.3.desc: Frieza somehow managed to gather up 2 Saiyans warriors and had gathered the Dragon balls. Make sure that he doesn't succeed!
dbc.sagadbsbroly.4.title: Fight against a powerful Saiyan 2
dbc.sagadbsbroly.4.desc: Broly seems to get constantly stronger...
dbc.sagadbsbroly.5.title: Fight against a powerful Saiyan 3
dbc.sagadbsbroly.5.desc: Frieza killed Paragus, and now Broly's power unleashed to an unimaginable level.
dbc.sagadbsbroly.6.title: Fight against a powerful Saiyan 4
dbc.sagadbsbroly.6.desc: He is far too stronger. Do your best to take him out!
dbc.sagadbsbroly.7.title: Victory
dbc.sagadbsbroly.7.desc: Broly was teleported away using the Dragon balls before his defeat. With this Frieza no longer desires to be on Earth for the time being, but he will come back.
dbc.sagadbsbroly.8.title: The End
dbc.sagadbsbroly.8.desc: Good job, you have finished the DBC DBS Broly Movie Side mission!/nThank you for playing with Dragon Block C!

jinryuujrmcore.selectpwratcreator: Select Power type at character creation.
jinryuujrmcore.hairTierDesc: Tier 1 options are for the rotations and length and Tier 2 options are for bending properties and DBC shape change Intensity
jinryuujrmcore.hairDoAllDesc: The sliders that turn grey will copy changes to every block on this page
jinryuujrmcore.HairSalonDesc: It will open the HairSalon site where you can browse hairstyles from other users at http://HairSalon.jingames.net
jinryuujrmcore.HairShareDesc: It will copy your current hairstyle code to clipboard to share with others, mainly meant for the http://HairSalon.jingames.net site
jinryuujrmcore.HairPasteDesc: It will paste a hairstyle code from clipboard
jinryuujrmcore.HairResetDesc: It will reset the current hairstyle to the hairstyle preset currently selected
jinryuujrmcore.NaturalDesc: The Basic Minecraft Interface with nothing additional, except the appearance (increasing compatibility with other mods)
jinryuujrmcore.KiDesc: The Dragon Block Energy. If you want to access the Dragon Block C features choose this
jinryuujrmcore.ChakraDesc: The Naruto Energy. If you want to access the Naruto C features choose this
jinryuujrmcore.SpiritualistDesc: Fighters that want to excel in §9Energy §8usage
jinryuujrmcore.WarriorDesc: Fighters who prefer §cPhysical §8fitness and raw power
jinryuujrmcore.NormalDesc: No Death Penalty, current chance for TP gain is %1$s
jinryuujrmcore.HardDesc: Death Penalty (1 point loss from a random attribute), %1$s chance for TP gain
jinryuujrmcore.InsaneDesc: Death Penalty (1 point loss from random 2 attributes), %1$s chance for TP gain
jinryuujrmcore.MndDB: Increases TP gain amount and Skill Limits
jinryuujrmcore.SkillSysNext: Attribute %1$s required to learn or improve skills!/nSkills Learned: %2$s
jinryuujrmcore.SkillSysMax: Your Mind has reached its limits!/nSkills Learned: %1$s
jinryuujrmcore.needRacialSkillMax: You need to Max out your race skill!
jinryuujrmcore.SpDBDesc: Maximum reachable running speed %1$s%%/nUpgrading %2$s attribute and %3$s skill will increase speed
jinryuujrmcore.FSDBDesc: Maximum reachable flying speed is around %1$s%% /nUpgrading %2$s attribute and %3$s skill will increase speed
jinryuujrmcore.pDied2: %1$s died! Last known attack was %2$s seconds ago by %3$s
jinryuujrmcore.delskillconfirm: Do you want to DELETE the skill %1$s?
jinryuujrmcore.teachingOffer: %1$s have been offered to teach "%2$s" techniqu for %3$s TP. To accept type /jrmc accept
jinryuujrmcore.teachingOfDeclByYou: You have declined %1$s's "%2$s" technique teaching offer!
jinryuujrmcore.teachingOfDeclByPlayr: %1$s has declined your technique teaching offer!
jinryuujrmcore.typedWrong: You typed a command parameter wrong!
jinryuujrmcore.noslotleft: There is no free slot left!
jinryuujrmcore.skillupped: Skill %1$s has been upgraded to lvl %2$s!
jinryuujrmcore.KaioDiffRedLine: Go to King Kai to reduce Difficulty

jinryuujrmcore.trainingweightno: Weight needs to be received from;a Trainer like Kami or King Kai;to have a weight!
jinryuujrmcore.shadowdummyDesc: Shadow Dummy is clone of the player that is as strong as the spawner but only the owner can actually use it. Training with this dummy will result in increased TP gain.
jinryuujrmcore.concentrationDesc: Concentration minigame with ingame daily limit on TP Claim./nClick the Blue balls to gather score./nRed balls will take score from you./nBlack balls will take score and take a life too./nGame over if score goes below zero or out of lifes./nScore will be converted to TP.
jinryuujrmcore.airBoxingDesc: Airboxing minigame with ingame daily limit on TP Claim./nKeys start to spawn on a Key Track/nwhich move towards the left side./nPress the shown key when it reaches/nthe box on the left side./nKeys become red when they are missed.
jinryuujrmcore.BPswapDesc: You can change your Battle power calculation to Normal and High. /nThe Normal indicates the currently most accurte power scale, used for comparisons between players. And /nthe High is only for fun and has ridiculous high scales, and is not accurate at all. (Client Only)/nCurrent BP: %1$s
jinryuujrmcore.CltSettingsDesc: Client Settings might have impact on gameplay but mostly settings are visual only.
jinryuujrmcore.missionRepeat.wait: You can replay this story after %4$sd %3$s:%2$s:%1$s
jinryuujrmcore.missionUnlock: Complete at least once the following stories to play:

jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_1_desc: C-Charging your release level/nR-Turbo Mode/nG-Transform(DBC)/Blood line skill(Naruto C)/nH-Descending forms, and lower Release level./nF-Flight mode (needs flight skill)/nX-Action Menu: Here you can enable skills and forms./nPick Block/Mouse Wheel click-Open Spacepod GUI.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_2_desc: Open: Use Second Function Key+Inventory (Check Controls in case you don't know the key)/nThese are head,body,weight, and 3 Vanity slots/nVanity slots on the right can be arranged in any way possible.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_3_desc: Release is needed in order to start gaining TP, to level up stats and skills. Each player has a release level in the top left corner. The % sign shows your current release level. By charging with the 'C' key you can start to gain up to 50%. You can only go beyong that by learning Potential Unlock from Kami at the Lookout. You can lower your release by pressing 'H'. Your Battle Power changes with your release.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_4_desc: In order to get stronger you need to gain TP, which you get when hitting Entities like mobs IF you have a release level above 0%. Going over the Attributes you can read about what you will gain from them. And in order to level up skills, you will need TP And you will need to level up your MND or Mind Attribute. In the skills tab C stands for TP, and M for Mind.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_5_desc: You can level up skills using TP (C), or TP and Mind (M). Some learned skills will appear in the middle right skill hot bar you have. There you can scroll through them using your Second Function Key + your mouse scroll wheel. To use a skill you use the Second Function Key+Right click IF you have a release level above 0%.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_6_desc: You have an action menu, that you can open using the 'X' key. It is used to select what form you turn in to, or just enable/disable certain options. Remember, than if it says 'Disable', it will disable it when clicked, not that it already is disabled.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_7_desc: Players have Forms, some of which depend on their race. You can level up your main forms in the skills tab, but there are other ones you can learn. Some Masters can teach you Form Skills. For example King kai teaches you Mystic Form, and Kaioken. These forms can be used by Pressing 'X' to open up your action Menu. You transform by holding 'G', and descend by pressing 'H'. IF you enable a Form in the Action menu, you will transform in to that.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_8_desc: Turbo: You can move faster using turbo mode by pressing 'R'./nFly: You can enter Flight mode by pressing 'F', but you will need to first learn Flight from a Master./nSwoop: You can Swoop to fly faster. It requiers Fly. Once it is are learned, you can open your action bar ith 'X' and Enable it. Use it with Second Function Key+Walk Forward key./nDash: Use dash with Second Function + Movement Left/Right/Backwards Key.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_9_desc: In your world there are new Structures spawning that have Masters in them. Some buildings have a fix location (for example Kamis lookout, and Enmas and King Kais place in heaven), but some only spawn in specific biomes when you are close to them (for example Cell Games Arena spawns in plains anywhere the player is close to one). Kamis lookout is found at around X 80, Z 45, so its close to the world center and spawn.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_10_desc: Safe zones are areas, which spawn with Masters. They surround them. Every enemy entity, or Skills used by players vanish when entering one. The flying nimbus is also not possible to be used in them.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_11_desc: There are two type of dragon blocks, the small earth type, and the large planet namek ones. Both work the same way. They spawn in the world at the set time in the configs every now and then. By placing one of a kind in an 'H' form you can summon the dragon by right clicking the middle one. Than right click the dragon for a wish.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_12_desc: There are multiple new dimensions for planets and other worlds. You can use a spacepod to travel to planet namek, planet vegeta, and back to the overworld. When dying, you will be transported to the otherworld. There you can visit King Kai, and a Strong Warrior, or you can talk to Enma to revive you.
jinryuujrmcore.help_guide_13_desc: Mystic: You can learn from King Kai as 'Old Kai's Ritual'. You will lose levels from it by time./nMajin: Learned from Babidi by anyone who is evil. You can only lose it by dying. /nKaioken: Learned from King Kai. You can use it multiple times to increase the level of it but you will lose more and more health. You will receive a debuff called Strained when using it. /nLegendary: This is given randomly to players. It gives you a green icon, and turns your hair green in certain transformations.
jinryuujrmcore.entitymasters.nofightinsa: Fighting is not allowed in Safe Zones!

nc.sagasystem.0.title: Welcome to Naruto C
nc.sagasystem.0.desc: This is an alternative story based on the original Naruto anime, /nso while it might follow some parts of the original story it will be completly different. /nThis is your story to become the Greatest Shinobi!
nc.sagasystem.1.title: Academic Test
nc.sagasystem.1.desc: You have prove your strength in a one-on-one hand combat against Iruka-sensei.
nc.sagasystem.2.title: Mitsugi Attacks
nc.sagasystem.2.desc: You see a Human Shadow heading towards you. It's Mitsugi! He holds a huge scroll on his back.
nc.sagasystem.3.title: Academic Graduation
nc.sagasystem.3.desc: Congratulations! You are now a shinobi in-training!
nc.sagasystem.4.title: Teacher Selected
nc.sagasystem.4.desc: Genin teams have been assigned. The Hokage has acknowledged your Strength, and decided Kakashi to be your team Leader.
nc.sagasystem.5.title: Mission One - Cat hunt
nc.sagasystem.5.desc: First missions of a Shinobi are usually D-rank missions./nCatch the cats! You need to capture the gets by deafeating them./nMission Rank: D
nc.sagasystem.6.title: Mission Two - Seed Gathering
nc.sagasystem.6.desc: You have been asked to get some wheat seeds./nMission Rank: D
nc.sagasystem.7.title: Mission Three - Flowers
nc.sagasystem.7.desc: The Flower shop needs some Dandelions and Poppies./nMission Rank: D
nc.sagasystem.8.title: Final Mission - Secured merchant
nc.sagasystem.8.desc: An old merchant needs to be secured for his travels to the Land of Waves/nMission Rank: C
nc.sagasystem.9.title: Unexpected Attack
nc.sagasystem.9.desc: After almost arriving to the Land of Waves, two Shinobis have attacked you. They look tough, so dont let your Guard down!/nMission Rank: A
nc.sagasystem.10.title: It's not over yet!
nc.sagasystem.10.desc: Zabuza goes full out after witnessing Haku's defeat.
nc.sagasystem.11.title: Mission Complete
nc.sagasystem.11.desc: The merchant has been arrested for giving invalid information to the mission.
nc.sagasystem.12.title: Chuunin Exams
nc.sagasystem.12.desc: Since you're doing amazing progress as being a shinobi, Kakashi registered you for the Chuunin exams. Good luck, and give it your all!
nc.sagasystem.13.title: Test of Spirit
nc.sagasystem.13.desc: You've succesfuly gathered all 3 Scrolls to pass the test, but you've met up with Orochimaru. and he took them!
nc.sagasystem.14.title: Test of Might
nc.sagasystem.14.desc: The second test is a one-on-one combat between two randomly selected Genins. Good Luck!
nc.sagasystem.15.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.16.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.17.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.18.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.19.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.20.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.21.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.22.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.23.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.24.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.25.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.26.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.27.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.28.title: Test of Skill
nc.sagasystem.28.desc: The finals are beginnig! You will face another finalist. Give all you got!
nc.sagasystem.29.title: BATLLE ON!
nc.sagasystem.30.title: CHANGE OF STRENGTH
nc.sagasystem.30.desc: Naruto has activated the Nine Tails chakra.
nc.sagasystem.31.title: Sunagakure's Plan
nc.sagasystem.31.desc: What's this? Sunagakure has started to make their move! Protect your allies from Gaara!
nc.sagasystem.32.title: Sunagakure's Plan
nc.sagasystem.32.desc: Watch out! Gaara has been overtaken by his tailed beast inside, you have to stay alive!
nc.sagasystem.33.title: Exams are over
nc.sagasystem.33.desc: The exams got cancelled from the turn of events. /nThanks to your effort, Sunagakure's plan has failed, but not completely.
nc.sagasystem.34.title: To be continued!
nc.sagasystem.34.desc: How did you like the story? /nIt is not final and there will be more to come! /nThank you for playing my mods! Greetings from JinRyuu!/nvisit our main website at http://jingames.net
